title: Skyblock Isles
description: A collection of ambient and QoL mods for Skyblock Isles!
body:
![Skyblock Isles Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/251cd8c1e2c7f4ef678780818b1b88acd8f09b88.png)

This modpack is designed for usage on the **Skyblock Isles Minecraft Server**, it provides numerous performance increases and quality-of-life additions that revolve around the server's experience. 

# **Performance Increase**
With modern performance-enhancing mods like Sodium, Lithium, and more, this modpack has the potential to massively outclass* vanilla and Optifine framerates, allowing you to experience Isles as it was meant to be.


# **Minor tweaks**
In order to smooth the MMO experience in Minecraft, this pack provides a few tweaks that don't break the Vanilla feel. These include but are not limited to: extended chat history, ambient sounds, additional animations, and more!

# **Reach out**
Ping me on Discord if you have any suggestions or questions! 




### *Disclaimer
While the performance-enhancing mods in this modpack can and will provide a much smoother Minecraft experience, the choice to use shaders or otherwise may further impact performance depending on your particular PC specifications.
